title: Boligejerne: Sådan kan forældre hjælpe børn ind på boligmarkedet

# Boligejerne: Sådan kan forældre hjælpe børn ind på boligmarkedet

**Feed**: borsen-podcast  
**Published**: 2026-06-21  
**Market Sentiment**: Neutral

⏱️ **Time Horizon Key**: ST = <3 months | MT = 3-12 months | LT = >12 months

---

## Episode Thesis

This episode of the Danish podcast 'Boligejerne' focuses entirely on personal finance and tax advice for parents helping their adult children enter the housing market ('forældrekøb'). It covers financing models, rental income taxation, the business tax scheme (virksomhedsordning), gift rules, and property transfer valuations. No equities or investment theses are discussed; the only firms named are the sponsor (Saxo Bank), an advisory firm, and the central bank.

---

## Recommendations

_No signals for universe stocks in this episode._
